title: Negizhiyinil Lyrics Nimirndhu Nil Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Negizhiyinil
Singer(s): Haricharan, Saindhavi
Lyrics : Madhan Karky
MOvie: Nimirndhu Nil
Music: GV Prakash

Negizhiyinil nenjam kondae
unnai vilagi ponaval.
Nerungi vara aasai kondu,
uyir ilagi nirkiren.

Anayum thiri thoondida, oli meendida
ennai theendidu uyire.
ivalin thuyar theerthida, vali theerthida
viral korthidu uyire.

Naalaa puramum naalaayiram nee.
aanaalum unnai en thaedinen.

Negizhiyinil nenjam kondae
unnai vilagi ponaval.
Nerungi vara aasai kondu,
uyir ilagi nirkiren.

Hey pavalap paarai padalam pole
manadhil niraindhaai.
Immaigal moodi thirakkum munne
edhanaal maraindhaai.

Unmaiyil un unmaiyil
en kadhalai therindhaen.
Inmayil un inmayil,
un thanmayai arindhaen.
Kadandhodidum kanam yaavilum
enadhu yekkamey ganakkum.

Negizhiyinil nenjam endra
neruppai yen ketkiraai.
Nerinji mullai pole nindre
nerungi vara paarkiraai.

Uzhagam ariyaa kuzhandhai enavae
unnai naan ninaithaen.
Uzhagam unnai vanangum pozhudhu
un kadamai unardhaen.

Maatrida ennai maatrida
indha boomiye ninaikka.
Kadhale nee maarinaai
indhai engu naan uraikka.

Ennai yetridu unnai ootridu
uyir yetridu uyire.

Negizhiyinil nenjam kondae
neruppai yen ketkiraai.
Nerungi vara aasai kondu,
uyir ilagi nirkiraai.

Anayum thiri thoondida, oli meendida
unnai theenduven azhagae.
unadhu vizhi paarthida, viral korthida,
thuyar theendidum uyire.

Naalaa puramum naalaayiram nee.
aanaalum unnai en thaedinen.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Negizhiyinil'?

The song 'Negizhiyinil' expresses deep emotions of love and longing, portraying the struggles and joys of a romantic relationship.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie 'Nimirndhu Nil'?

This song plays a crucial role in highlighting the emotional journey of the characters, reflecting their inner feelings and connection.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Haricharan and Saindhavi, with music composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was 'Negizhiyinil' released?

'Negizhiyinil' was released on December 12, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Negizhiyinil', the protagonists express their heartfelt emotions through a captivating melody that resonates with anyone who has experienced love. The song beautifully conveys themes of longing and connection, making it a standout moment in the film Nimirndhu Nil. With its soothing composition and poignant lyrics by Karky, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This duet not only enhances the narrative but also leaves a lasting impression on the listener.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Negizhiyinil from the movie Nimirndhu Nil is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Haricharan and Saindhavi, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and enchanting music by GV Prakash Kumar. Experience the emotional depth and melodic charm that makes this track a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: In my heart, I carry you like a flame. With a desire to reach you, I stand here alive.
I will chase away the darkness, calling out to you, my life. To relieve her pain, to end her suffering, I will reach out, my life.
You are the world and a thousand things. Yet, I have searched for you.
Hey, you have filled my heart like a beautiful garden. Before the moments close, you have vanished.
In your truth, I have found my love. In your presence, I have understood your essence. Even in the distance, my longing counts.
In my heart, you are the fire I seek. You stand like a thorny flower, waiting to be reached.
I thought of you, child of the world. When the world honors you, I understand your duty.
Change me, change this earth, I think. Love, you have changed, where do I speak now?
I will rise, I will carry you, my life will rise.
In my heart, I carry the fire I seek. With a desire to reach you, I stand here alive.
I will chase away the darkness, calling out to you, my beauty. When I see your eyes, I will reach out, relieving the pain, my life.
You are the world and a thousand things. Yet, I have searched for you.
